title: HubMAP Lung TMC Overview of Proteomics, Lipidomics, and Metabolomics Assays From Sample Generation to Data Pre-processing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4mkdn","text":"This master protocol summarizes the protocols utilized in the HuBMAP Lung Tissue Mapping Center (TMC) Project to generate proteomics, lipidomics, and metabolomics from tissue blocks selected from different regions of the organ from the bronchus to the alveolar and pleura regions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: The criteria for lung inclusion in the study " 602.2 Donor Acceptance Criteria for URMC HTC HuBMAP and LungMAP Inclusion ".

To limit block utilization and contamination by embedding material (OCT/CMC) we generated 2 50-µm-thick sections that were placed in an MPLEx compatible cryotube. The method utilized for this is provided in the following protocols.io: " Preparation of Lung Tissue Blocks for MPLEx ".

The thick sections were further extracted using a modified Folch extraction method, termed MPLEx (Metabolites, Proteins, and Lipids), as described in the following protocols.io: " Metabolites, Lipids, Protein extraction protocol (MPLEx) ".
After the MPLEx extraction, the proteins were further processed using the following protocols.io: " Proteomics Sample Preparation (Urea/trypsin digestion) - for Mammalian tissues ".
Then the data was pre-processed using the following protocols.io: " DIA data analysis in DIA-NN against a DDA library generated in FragPipe ".
After the MPLEx extraction, the lipids were further processed using the following protocols.io: " Protocol for the LC-MS/MS-based lipidomics assay of samples generated using the MPLEx method ".
The protocols for whole-lung lobe processing are provided in the following protocols.io: " 603.3 & 604.5_URMC_HTC_Whole Lung and Lobe Processing ".

After the MPLEx extraction, the metabolites were further processed using the following protocols.io: " Protocol for the LC-MS/MS-based metabolomics analysis of samples generated using the MPLEx method ". note: this protocol comprises both the analysis method and the pre-processing of the data

The prepared peptides are then injected on a dedicated liquid chromatography coupled with a tandem mass spectrometer using the following protocol: " Protocol for the LC-MS/MS-based proteomics analysis of samples generated using the MPLEx method ".
Region specific tissue sampling protocol is provided in the following protocols.io: " HuBMAP lung tissue sampling protocol ".
Then the data was pre-processed using the following protocols.io: " Lipidomics identifications and quantitation table generation using MS-DIAL (v4.9.221218) ".
creator: Geremy Clair
